title: Darktrace Email Update Incident Fields
content:
Update all incident fields that may change over time.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Darktrace pack (Darktrace, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: DarktraceEmail.
